pieces.label: seeds concrete poem (liminal threshold diamond, ending in ॐ)
pieces.note: Diamond/mandala-shaped concrete poem built from the word 'seeds' framing capitalized/lowercase keyword pairs (LIMINAL THRESHOLD, THOUGHT, FASTER, mesh, polyphony, interference, etc.), narrowing to a point that ends on the ॐ (Om) glyph. Responds to the user's 'liminal edge / poly-conscious mesh' transmission. Fenced in a code block.

missed_or_ambiguous: Only one piece in the batch. The fenced block in ommm MSG 2 is genuine concrete/shape poetry, not source code. The user's poem in opus_4_5 MSG 1 (free-verse caps) is user content, excluded. The '---' separators in looper MSG 8 and gem_pro MSG 8/10 are markdown horizontal rules, not visual art.
